---
---

## Slide 1 - Single display equation

$$E = mc^2$$

## Slide 2 - Multi-line display equation

$$
x^* = \left\{
    \begin{array}{ll}
      \dfrac{x^\lambda - 1}{\lambda} & \lambda \neq 0 \\
      \log x & \lambda = 0
    \end{array}
  \right.
$$

## Slide 3 - Multiple display equations

$$a^2 + b^2 = c^2$$

$$E = mc^2$$

## Slide 4 - Equation alongside paragraph

Some preceding paragraph text.

$$\int_0^\infty e^{-x}\, dx = 1$$

A trailing paragraph.
